title: Andy CLI headless run config v1
description: Schema for the config file consumed by `andy-cli run --headless --config <path>`. Every field here is applied or verified by the runtime; there are no silent no-ops. `policy_id` and `boundaries` were REMOVED from v1 because the runtime enforced neither and their presence created false security assurance (rivoli-ai/andy-cli#180) - configs carrying them are now rejected as unknown properties. See docs/headless-runtime.md, docs/adr/0002-headless-v1-inactive-fields.md, and Epic AQ (rivoli-ai/andy-cli#44) for the full semantics.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump to 2 introduces a new schema file (v2.json) and a separate compatibility layer; do not overload v1.

run_id.description: Correlates stdout events and artifacts with the andy-containers Run entity (rivoli-ai/andy-containers#103).

slug.description: Agent identifier from andy-agents (Epic W W5 seed). Lowercase ASCII, dash-separated, 2-64 chars.

revision.description: Optional pin to a specific agent revision. Null/absent = head.

instructions.description: Resolved system prompt: agent.instructions concatenated with delegation_contract.objective.

output_format.description: Enforced format for the agent's final output. A label beginning with 'json' (case-insensitive, e.g. 'json', 'json-triage-output-v1') requires the final output to be syntactically valid JSON; the run fails (exit 1) if it is not. Any other label (e.g. 'plain') is treated as free-form and not enforced by the runtime.

provider.description: LLM provider. Pluggable via Andy.Llm adapter registry.

id.description: Model identifier as recognised by the provider (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'gpt-5-medium').

api_key_ref.description: How to resolve the API key. The ONLY form implemented in v1 is 'env:NAME' (read env var NAME). 'secret-store:NAME' and bare key values are rejected at load time (exit 2). When present, the referenced env var's value is loaded into the provider's API key; the value is never logged or emitted.

tools.description: Concrete tool bindings this run is allowed to call, resolved from the agent's skills × allowed_tools.

name.description: Tool identifier as seen by the agent.

command.description: Default argv the agent prepends. The agent appends its own args.

root.description: Absolute path inside the container to the mounted workspace (typically /workspace).

branch.description: Git branch the run is expected to operate on. The container runtime checks this branch out before launch; the headless runtime VERIFIES it: if set, workspace.root must be a git work tree whose current branch matches, otherwise the run fails fast (exit 1). It does not itself check out or switch branches.

env_vars.description: Additional env vars set into the agent process environment before provider/tool wiring. Reserved names MUST NOT appear here; a config that tries to shadow one is rejected at load time (exit 2). Two families are reserved: container-runtime identity (ANDY_PROXY_URL, ANDY_TOKEN, ANDY_MCP_URL), and permission-engine controls read when the fail-closed permission gate is built (ANDY_PERMISSION_MODE, ANDY_PERMISSIONS_FILE, ANDY_PERMISSIONS_JSON).

file.description: Path to write the final structured output. Atomic write (tmp + rename). Absent on failure before output stage.

stream.description: Where the structured event stream goes. 'stdout' (default) writes NDJSON to standard output; 'fifo' writes it to the named FIFO at event_sink.path, which then becomes REQUIRED (see the top-level allOf/if-then). The runtime opens that path for writing and streams every event to it.

nats_subject.description: NATS subject the container runtime (Epic AP6) will fan events to. Agent does not publish directly.

path.description: Absolute path to a named FIFO. Required when output.stream == 'fifo'; the runtime opens it for writing and streams every event to it.

transcript.description: Optional durable diagnostic transcript. Presence enables an atomic, uniquely named NDJSON file keyed by run_id. Records are redacted and bounded before persistence; retention cleanup is deterministic.

max_record_bytes.description: Maximum UTF-8 bytes retained for one record. Larger records become a redacted preview plus digest.

max_run_bytes.description: Maximum UTF-8 bytes for one transcript, including its terminal record.

max_age_days.description: Delete completed transcripts older than this many days.

max_files.description: Maximum completed transcript files retained in the directory.

max_total_bytes.description: Maximum total bytes retained across completed transcripts.

redact_env_vars.description: Additional environment variable names whose resolved values must be removed from persisted records. model.api_key_ref and ANDY_TOKEN are always included.

permissions.description: AX.4 (rivoli-ai/conductor#2091) per-run permission allow-list. Headless is fail-closed: mutating built-ins (write_file/delete_file/move_file/copy_file/file_editor/replace_text/create_directory) and execute_command default to deny. Tools listed here are relaxed to allow (injected above the builtin defaults); everything else stays denied. Absent = unchanged fail-closed behavior. Populated by AX.9/andy-containers from the resolved policy.

allowed_tools.description: Tool ids the run is permitted to execute (e.g. 'write_file', 'execute_command'). A normally-Ask tool becomes executable when listed; a tool not listed stays denied. Empty grants nothing beyond auto-allowed read-only built-ins.

required_actions.description: Bounded machine-checkable actions that must succeed before output publication. Requirements are evaluated from actual observed tool outcomes, never from model claims. Absent or empty preserves the existing success contract.

command_equals.description: Optional exact normalized command match. Valid only for execute_command; glob-like patterns, control characters, and multi-line values are rejected. Regular-expression syntax is never interpreted.

at_least.description: Minimum number of matching successful terminal outcomes.

max_iterations.description: Hard cap on agent loop iterations. Exceeded = exit code 4 (timeout).

allOf.$comment: Cross-field requirement: FIFO event streaming needs a sink path. When output.stream is 'fifo', event_sink.path must be present so the runtime knows where to write the event stream.
